<?php namespace Spatie\Ray\Payloads; use Spatie\Ray\ArgumentConverter; class DecodedJsonPayload extends Payload { /** @var string */ protected $value; public function __construct(string $value) { $this->value = $value; } public function getType(): string { return 'custom'; } public function getContent(): array { $decodedJson = json_decode($this->value, true); return [ 'content' => ArgumentConverter::convertToPrimitive($decodedJson), 'label' => '', ]; } }
